The '''''First Edition''''' was a [[Surronian L19 heavy freighter/Legends|Surronian L19 heavy freighter]] bought by [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Aricos Dreleene]] under the erroneous assumption that it was an exclusive model that he could show off in parties. Discovering that it was a mass-production ship, Dreleene spent a fortune modifying it for his pompous purposes.

The ship and the Moff later ended up in the custody of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]], where Moff Dreleene was imprisoned and the ''First Edition'' was renamed the '''''Almost Authentic''''' for use as a transport.

==History==
The ''First Edition'' was one of the first [[Surronian L19 heavy freighter/Legends|Surronian L19 heavy freighter]]s built for its second production. [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Aricos Dreleene]] mistakenly believed it was an [[L19a freighter|"L19a"]] luxury, exclusive model, and bought the ship to show it in important meetings on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] he was invited to.<ref name="Stock Ships" />

Discovering it was not what he had thought, Dreleene spent 220,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] to customize it, faking any ID. He then introduced his new ship as the only Surronian ship big enough for his collection of furniture and trophies.<ref name="Stock Ships" />

Later, while in his ship in [[Warchigade trade route]], in deep space, Dreleene was attacked by [[Privateer/Legends|privateers]] associated to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]]. Dreleene was captured and then filmed while admitting that his ship was a phony simulation. The Alliance uploaded his confession to [[Cynabar's InfoNet/Legends|Cynabar's InfoNet]], imprisoned Dreleene and confiscated the ship.<ref name="Stock Ships" />

The Alliance then spent two weeks modifying the ''First Edition'' so that it could be used as a transport. After two weeks, the ship was in condition to be used, and its name changed to ''Almost Authentic.'' Nonetheless, the Alliance noticed that she still looked like a rich man's toy, that it would be expensive to maintain, and that its part would probably be highly coveted by some; so the Alliance considered getting rid of the ''Almost Authentic'' in short term.<ref name="Stock Ships" />

==Modifications==
Dreeleene's expenses went to hiring [[Outlaw tech/Legends|outlaw tech]] to change serial numbers, ID tags and transponder codes, and [[Slicer/Legends|slicers]] to modify the documents of the ship.<ref name="Stock Ships" />

The Alliance instead installed an [[Ion cannon/Legends|ion cannon]], replaced the fire control systems, increased the ship's mobility, and replaced the secondary escape pod and part of the consumables storage tanks with cargo space.<ref name="Stock Ships" />

==Sources==
*<!-- 1997-06-XX -->''[[Stock Ships]]''
